_note: True 7-day and 30-day rolling windows require a fresh Seller Central export. The numbers below use the Apr 1-19 export (19 days of data) split two ways: (A) full 19-day window as closest proxy for 30-day, (B) Apr 13-19 7-day approximation using per-day averages from the 19-day dataset. Pull a fresh Campaign export + Search Term report on 2026-04-26 for clean 7d/30d numbers.

search_term_insights._diagnosis: Our product has a pump and filter. Every 'pumpless / filterless / no filter' search term is shopping for a different product. Negating these families (as phrase) blocks future matches automatically.

diagnosis.headline: Portfolio ACoS 171.55% over 19 days. Losing $1.72 in ad spend for every $1 in sales. The rescue actions (Phase 1+2+2.5) target this directly.
root_causes: Manual Keywords Campaign converter keyword ('cat water fountain stainless steel' phrase + exact) is over-bid at $1.49 — real 19-day ACoS on phrase = 131.57%, exact = 212.46%. Bids cut to $1.00 on Apr 19.
Close Automatic Campign spent $37.02 with zero purchases in 19 days. Paused Apr 19.
5 intent-mismatch search terms (pumpless/filterless/no filter/battery) spent $43.81 for zero sales. Negated Apr 19.
wins_buried_in_data: 'cordless cat water fountain stainless steel' search term: 33.65% ACoS over 19 days. Harvested as exact @ $1.35.
